'''Tempest 1''' was an [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|AT-AT]] sent to [[Endor/Legends|Endor]] as part of [[Tempest Force/Legends|Tempest Force]]. It used an adapted [[TIE series/Legends|TIE]] targeting system to combat maneuverable [[T-47 airspeeder/Legends|T-47 airspeeders]]. ''Tempest 1'' had been previously used in [[Battle of Kashyyyk (19 BBY)|subjugation]] of [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]].

In [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], it was commanded by [[Igar/Legends|Igar]], who used it to bring the captured [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] to [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]], and the Commander then used it to continue his search for Rebels in the forests.
